## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`bash tests/run_tests.sh`, `pytest web/backend/tests`, `npm run build` in `web/frontend` as relevant)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check`, `ruff format --check`, `shellcheck` on touched scripts, `tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, certificates, or local cluster topology committed
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior or config changed (`README.md`, `INSTALL.md`, `TROUBLESHOOTING.md`, or the live docs site as appropriate)
- [ ] Commits signed with DCO (`git commit -s`)
